step_by_step_thinking:
Tool Call: retrieve("patient willingness to participate in community-based medical education in regional and rural Australia")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

You must write at most two sentences. Then state your final answer choice using \boxed{{letter}} format.
The retrieved evidence shows that patient involvement in community-based participatory research (CBPR) increases when patients feel empowered through mutual goal-setting and shared ownership of research objectives—principles highly transferable to community-based medical education in rural and regional Australia. Such models prioritize trust-building, cultural relevance, and shared decision-making, aligning strongly with documented patient preferences for meaningful participation in health improvement processes.
\boxed{\text{A}}
